name: Herman Double-Chocolate Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl of electric mixer, cream butter and sugars.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each.
3. Stir dry ingredients together.
4. Combine starter and vanilla; add alternately with dry ingredients to the sugar mixture.
5. Spread in a greased 11 1/2 x 7 1/2 x 1 1/2 inches pan.
6. Sprinkle chocolate and nuts on top.
7. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 30 minutes.
